_description: Curated title-to-system mappings for ROM classification. Patterns are lowercase substrings matched against filenames. Longest match wins (sorted by length at load time). IGDB auto-appends successful lookups. Entries in _no_match skip future API queries. Only includes titles exclusive to one disc-based system to avoid false positives.
